Our Menu

Discover our delicious range of fresh food, made with love and quality ingredients.


Allergies: Please inform your server of any allergies or dietary restrictions. We take allergies seriously and will do our best to accommodate your needs. However, please be aware that our kitchen handles a variety of ingredients, and we cannot guarantee the complete absence of allergens in our dishes.

Cafe

Our cafe menu is perfect for a quick bite or a relaxing break with a delicious treat and a refreshing drink.

Hot Drinks

All can be ordered in small, medium, or large. Available to drink in or take away.

  • Americano
  • Cappuccino
  • Latte
  • Mocha
  • Hot Chocolate
  • Tea
  • Green Tea
Cold Drinks

A variety of cold drinks in cans and bottles. You can also enjoy a refreshing Slushie in either small, medium or large.

  • Coke
  • Diet Coke
  • Pepsi
  • Fanta
  • Diet Fanta
  • Irn Bru
  • Tango
  • 7-Up
  • Sprite
  • Dr Pepper
  • Monster (various flavours)
  • Slushies (various flavours)
Cold foods

Choose from our deli selection and order a pre-made sandwich or customise your own with fresh bread and ingredients. Combine these into meal deals to enjoy whilst staying in our comfortable indoor or outdoor area or take them to enjoy on the move. Choose from our bakery selection of freshly baked pies and treats.

Hot foods

Bacon sandwich Sausage sandwich Egg sandwich Mix and match Bacon, Sausage and Egg sandwich All-Day Breakfast Includes bacon, sausage, egg, beans, black pudding, tomatoes, mushrooms, and toast or fried bread. Can be ordered in small, medium, or large. Pie and Chips Choose from our selection of pies, served with thick-cut chips. Can come with gravy, mushy peas, or both. Burgers Available in chicken or beef and come in a variety of sizes, served with chips and onion rings. Extra toppings can include cheese and bacon.

Deli

Our Deli menu is perfect for a quick bite or a relaxing break with a delicious treat and a refreshing drink.

Pre prepared sandwiches

All sandwiches are prepared each morning using our fresh ingredients.

  • Ham and cheese
  • Chicken and bacon
  • Tuna mayo
  • Egg mayo
  • Cheese salad
  • Roast beef and onion
  • Chicken salad
  • BLT
  • Prawn mayo
  • Coronation chicken
Order Your Sandwich and Customise the Ingredients

All sandwich fillings are on display in our refrigerated glass display counter. Alongside this is our salad counter. Choose from our selection of freshly baked bread and fillings to make the perfect satisfying sandwich. Prices vary depending on the ingredients chosen.

Salad Boxes

Want a meal that's healthy and delicious? Our salad boxes are the perfect choice, packed with fresh ingredients and dressed to perfection. You can choose from our selection of prepared salads or build your own. Sizes are available for all appetites.

Meal Deals

Most of our sandwiches can be combined with a drink and a snack to make a meal deal. Perfect for a quick and satisfying lunch on the go or to enjoy in our comfortable seating area. Prices vary depending on the sandwich and drink chosen but are always great value for the quality of food and drink you receive. Check out our cafe menu for the drinks you can choose from to go with your meal deal. Snacks include crisps, chocolate bars, and a selection of our baked treats.

Bakery

Our Bakery selection is sure to meet your needs, whether you're looking for a hearty loaf of bread, a delicious pie or a savoury treat to enjoy with your coffee.

Freshly Baked Bread

Our freshly baked bread is made daily using traditional methods and the finest ingredients. Available in a variety of types, including sourdough, wholemeal, and ciabatta. Loaves are available in various sizes. We also offer a selection of rolls. We have a wide range of rolls that are also used for all our sandwiches.

Delicious Pies and Treats

Our selection of pies is perfect for any occasion. From classic favourites to seasonal specials, we have a pie for every taste. Made with the finest ingredients and baked to perfection. We also offer a wide range of treats that pair perfectly with our meal deals or can be enjoyed as a snack with a hot drink. Some of the treats include our speciality Scotch eggs, parmo pies, and stuffed sausage rolls.

Cakes and Cookies

Our selection of cakes and cookies is perfect for any occasion. From full family cakes to individual cookies, we have something for every taste. Made with the finest ingredients and baked to perfection. Do you have a sweet tooth? Check out our delicious selection!

Special Orders

Need something specific? Our team can create custom orders to meet your unique requirements. We can work with you to design the perfect item for your needs.

Butchers

Our selection of fresh meats and poultry are always fresh and of the highest quality. We have a wide variety of cuts available, as well as the option to have your meat cut to order.

Fresh Meats

All meats are fresh and locally sourced to ensure the highest quality. Clearly displayed in our separate refrigerated counter. Order to your preference or choose from some of our select cuts that have been pre-prepared. Also available are pre-packed products including sausages, bacon, minced meat (available in beef, lamb, and chicken), pork chops, ribs, wings, thighs, kidneys, and many more. Fancy something off menu? Speak to us and we can see if our suppliers are able to accommodate your requests.

Meal Packs

Fancy a quicker teatime at home? Some of our meal packs have been prepared and seasoned, ready to be cooked at any time. All freshly prepared by our head chef, these packs include his unique take on parmos, available in chicken and pork with various toppings. We also offer homemade, seasoned, chunky chicken bites. Our stew packs come with a generous serving of meat (available in chicken, beef, and lamb), as well as vegetables to give you a warm, hearty, and fulfilling meal. Our BBQ packs come in varying sizes to cater for every family size or gathering.

Cooked Meats

We cook a selection of our products to be used in our various menu items, including sandwiches, pies, dinners, and other dishes on our menu. We also have a selection ready to cut to order, freshly cooked and ready to eat. Do you have a meal planned but lack the signature centrepiece for your main course? Come in and chat with us — we can prepare and cook to your needs, ready for collection when you need it.

Specials

Check out our new Sunday roast dinners, available for delivery and collection every Sunday!


We also provide some vegetarian options, although these may be limited due to popularity. Some of our options include cauliflower steaks, Quorn chicken fillets, and more. There is also a separate gravy prepared as a vegetarian alternative. Please specify which option you would like when placing your order.

Small Dinner

This dinner is the ideal size for children to enjoy. Comes with a Yorkshire pudding, meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes, and a side pot of gravy.

Medium Dinner

This dinner is the ideal size for a filling meal. Comes with 2 Yorkshire puddings, healthy helpings of meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes, stuffing, and 2 side pots of gravy.

Large Dinner

This dinner is perfect for sharing or if you want to challenge yourself. Comes with 4 Yorkshire puddings, a generous portion of meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes, stuffing, pigs in blankets, and 2 large pots of gravy.

Extra Large Dinner

This dinner is a beast of a meal, ideal for those whose appetite is not easily satisfied. Includes a very generous portion of meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes, stuffing, pigs in blankets, and 3 large pots of gravy, all served in a giant Yorkshire pudding.

Contact us!
